# converter-epub.com

## Site Overview
converter-epub.com is a free, privacy-first online EPUB converter. All file processing happens entirely in the browser — no uploads, no server contact, no data collection.

## Core Functionality
- **Convert DOCX, HTML, TXT to EPUB** — fully client-side, no installation
- **No file size limit** (recommended under 50MB for best performance)
- **No watermarks, no sign-up, no fees**

## Supported Input Formats
- DOCX (Microsoft Word)
- HTML / HTM
- TXT (plain text)

## Output Format
- EPUB 3.0 / 3.4 (standard ebook format, compatible with Kindle, Kobo, Apple Books, Calibre, etc.)

## Key Pages
- **/** — Main converter tool
- **/formats** — Full list of supported input formats and details
- **/blog/** — Blog index (English)

## Blog Articles (English)
- **/blog/best-free-epub-converters** — Tool comparison
- **/blog/docx-to-epub** — DOCX to EPUB formatting guide
- **/blog/pdf-to-epub** — How to convert PDF to EPUB guide
- **/blog/epub-vs-pdf** — Format comparison guide
- **/blog/epub-converter-privacy** — Why browser-based conversion is safer
- **/blog/kindle-to-epub** — Kindle to EPUB conversion guide
- **/blog/calibre-9-9-new-features** — Calibre 9.9 release: EPUB conversion improvements
- **/blog/calibre-cli-batch-conversion** — Calibre CLI: batch convert EPUB to Kindle/Kobo/PDF
- **/blog/migrate-kindle-library-to-epub** — Kindle retirement: migrate library to EPUB / Kobo / Calibre
- **/blog/epub-3-4-spec-2026** — EPUB 3.4 spec 2026: what changed and why it matters

## Chinese Versions (中文)
- **/blog/zh/best-free-epub-converters** — 免费 EPUB 转换工具对比
- **/blog/zh/docx-to-epub** — DOCX 转 EPUB 格式指南
- **/blog/zh/pdf-to-epub** — PDF 转 EPUB 指南
- **/blog/zh/calibre-9-9-new-features** — Calibre 9.9 新功能详解
- **/blog/zh/calibre-cli-batch-conversion** — Calibre 命令行批量转换实战
- **/blog/zh/migrate-kindle-library-to-epub** — Kindle 淘汰后书库迁移指南
- **/blog/zh/epub-3-4-spec-2026** — EPUB 3.4 规范 2026 新特性

## Technical Details
- Pure HTML/CSS/JS, no backend
- Built with Astro, hosted on Cloudflare Pages
- Uses mammoth.js for DOCX parsing
- Uses JSZip for EPUB generation

## Contact
- Site: https://converter-epub.com
